name: passcode.is-compliant
title: Status Passcode Compliance
description: A status report of passcode compliance.

payloadkeys.title: Status item value.
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the passcode is in compliance with all passcode policies set on the device. If `false`, the passcode isn't in compliance with one or more passcode policies set on the device. When there are no passcode policies on the device, this value `true`.
